hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Upgrade: Absorb effect is upgraded to Super Absorb effect
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Super Absorb: Grant self the effect of increased max HP for 1 turn. The increased value is 30% of the damage dealt this time, with a maximum not exceeding 50% of one's base max HP (limited to 1 stack). Additionally, deal damage equal to 15% of own max HP to the target, with this damage capped at 260% of own ATK.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of attack power to enemy target
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of attack power to enemy target
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Absorb: Grant self the effect of increased max HP for 1 turn. The increased value is 20% of the damage dealt this time, with a maximum not exceeding 30% of one's base max HP (limited to 1 stack). Additionally, deal damage equal to 12% of own max HP to the target, with this damage capped at 200% of own ATK.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Super Absorb: Grant self the effect of increased max HP for 1 turn. The increased value is 30% of the damage dealt this time, with a maximum not exceeding 50% of one's base max HP (limited to 1 stack). Additionally, deal damage equal to 15% of own max HP to the target, with this damage capped at 260% of own ATK.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1134_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: At the start of your turn, grant all enemies 1 #Entry_1# effect, with a maximum of 3. After an enemy target with #Entry_1# uses an active skill, self immediately launches a pursuit attack on that target, dealing #Entry_2# damage equal to 180% of attack power, and increases own max HP by 8% for 1 turn
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the start of your turn, grant all enemies 1 #Entry_1# effect, with a maximum of 3. After an enemy target with #Entry_1# uses an active skill, self immediately launches a pursuit attack on that target, dealing #Entry_2# damage equal to 180% of attack power, and increases own max HP by 8% for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1134_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grant self #Entry_1# effect, and increase own attack-related abilities by 15%, damage dealt by non-active skills increased by 20%. If there are other non-organization characters on the ally team, increase basic ability values of the entire ally team by 5% and HP-related abilities by 5%, and this effect is doubled for self
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grant self #Entry_1# effect, and increase own attack-related abilities by 15%, damage dealt by non-active skills increased by 20%. If there are other non-organization characters on the ally team, increase basic ability values of the entire ally team by 5% and HP-related abilities by 5%, and this effect is doubled for self
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Surprise Attack: When unleashing an active skill, immediately pursue the target of this skill, dealing 160% ATK damage, and reducing the target's max HP by 12% for 1 turn. The reduced max HP of the target will be added to self, with the increased value not exceeding 18% of self's base max HP.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Surprise Attack: When unleashing an active skill, immediately pursue the target of this skill, dealing 160% ATK damage, and reducing the target's max HP by 12% for 1 turn. The reduced max HP of the target will be added to self, with the increased value not exceeding 18% of self's base max HP.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1134_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: When own current HP falls below 50% for the first time, grant self immunity to all damage for 1 turn, remove and gain immunity to all debuffs for 1 turn, and immediately grant all enemies #Entry_1# effect for 2 turns, while granting self #Entry_2# effect for 2 turns
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When own current HP falls below 50% for the first time, grant self immunity to all damage for 1 turn, remove and gain immunity to all debuffs for 1 turn, and immediately grant all enemies #Entry_1# effect for 2 turns, while granting self #Entry_2# effect for 2 turns

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases damage dealt by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases damage dealt by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1134_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grant self #Entry_1# effect, and increase own attack-related abilities by 15%, damage dealt by non-active skills increased by 20%. If there are other non-organization characters on the ally team, increase basic ability values of the entire ally team by 5% and HP-related abilities by 5%, and this effect is doubled for self
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grant self #Entry_1# effect, and increase own attack-related abilities by 15%, damage dealt by non-active skills increased by 20%. If there are other non-organization characters on the ally team, increase basic ability values of the entire ally team by 5% and HP-related abilities by 5%, and this effect is doubled for self
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Surprise Attack: When unleashing an active skill, immediately pursue the target of this skill. This pursuit first grants the target 1 Monitor effect, then deals 160% ATK as damage, and reduces the target's maximum HP by 12% for 1 turn. The reduced maximum HP of the target will be added to oneself, with the increased value not exceeding 18% of one's base maximum HP.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Surprise Attack: When unleashing an active skill, immediately pursue the target of this skill. This pursuit first grants the target 1 Monitor effect, then deals 160% ATK as damage, and reduces the target's maximum HP by 12% for 1 turn. The reduced maximum HP of the target will be added to oneself, with the increased value not exceeding 18% of one's base maximum HP.

skills.max_desc_short_translated: When inflicting Weak, grant oneself 10% increased ATK for 1 turn.
